mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_sample (title, content, payload_json, use_yn, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{payloadJson}, 'Y', #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, payload_json AS payloadJson, use_yn AS useYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM form_sample WHERE id = #{id} AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT id, title, content, payload_json AS payloadJson, use_yn AS useYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM form_sample WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY id DESC
